data.title: Realtor.com® names Janakiraman Karthikeyan as new CTO to drive technology vision and strategy.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on August 25, 2025, Janakiraman Karthikeyan was appointed as the new Chief Technology Officer of Realtor.com®. As the CTO, Karthikeyan will be responsible for guiding Realtor.com®'s technology direction and plans, making sure that advancements are in line with the company's goals and objectives in the long run.

data.title: Jordan Schultz partners with Fanatics Sportsbook to create new sports media content including a YouTube channel and video podcast with Draymond Green.
data.description: Today, Jordan Schultz, an NFL insider and reporter, revealed a new collaboration with Fanatics Sportsbook, marking a significant development in his career. This partnership will see the launch of a YouTube channel showcasing his latest show, The Schultz Report, along with the upcoming second season of a video podcast starring basketball star Draymond Green. The announcement comes as Schultz continues to expand his presence in the sports media industry.

data.title: EQT AB repurchased 534,181 of its own shares between Aug 18-22, 2025 as part of a program for up to 5,535,521 shares.
data.description: From August 18 to August 22, 2025, EQT AB (LEI code: 213800U7P9GOIRKCTB34) bought back a total of 534,181 of its own ordinary shares (ISIN: SE0012853455). This falls under their repurchase initiative for up to 5,535,521 shares. The activity occurred in Stockholm.

data.title: AGM of AUGA Group AB on 29th August, 2025 will discuss resolutions for items 5-6 with updated general voting ballot.
data.description: The upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of AUGA group, AB, a company in the midst of restructuring, with a legal entity code of 126264360 and a registered office at Konstitucijos Ave. 21C, Vilnius, is set to take place on August 29, 2025, at 10:00 AM. This meeting has been called by the Company's Board and will address proposed resolutions concerning items 5-6 on the agenda. The Company also intends to share more information and present an updated general voting ballot for the shareholders.

data.title: Global Chemical Reagents Market to reach USD 26.5B by 2034 at 7.5% CAGR. Demand valued at USD 14.1B in 2024, expected to reach USD 14.8B in 2025. Major growth seen in pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, and research institutions. Key drivers include increased R&D, focus on diagnostic testing, academic and industrial research growth, compliance with environmental standards, and laboratory automation. Regional scope includes North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America.
data.description: The research report "Chemical Reagents Market" by Custom Market Insights predicts significant growth in the global chemical reagents market. In 2024, the market size was approximately USD 14.1 billion, expected to reach USD 14.8 billion in 2025, and projected to hit around USD 26.5 billion by 2034, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 7.5%. The market is witnessing higher demand in pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, and manufacturing sectors, with key players like Merck, Thermo Fisher Scientific, and Sigma-Aldrich focusing on high-purity and specialty reagents. The report also highlights trends such as increased investment in pharmaceutical and biotech R&D, rising demand for diagnostic testing reagents, growth in academic and industrial research, compliance with environmental standards, and the integration of laboratory automation and digitization. Regional markets are also discussed, including North America's emphasis on innovation, Europe's focus on sustainability, and the Asia-Pacific region's growth in pharma drug sector. Overall, the chemical reagents market is evolving due to rapid technological advancements and regulatory changes, leading to substantial market expansion.

data.title: Central Urban Work Conference in July 2025 outlined goal for modern cities; shift from '1 respect, 5 coordinations' to '1 optimization, 6 constructions'.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Beijing, a recent conference highlighted the importance of modern cities as key pillars of development and quality living for residents. The Central Urban Work Conference in July outlined the objective of constructing contemporary, citizen-focused cities. This initiative aims to enhance the overall living standards and happiness of the population by prioritizing urban development. The establishment of these modern cities is designed to cater to the needs and well-being of the people, incorporating innovative features and amenities to promote a high quality of life. The conference emphasized the central role of cities in driving modernization and ensuring a satisfactory living environment for residents.

data.title: Silver mining sector thriving in 2025 as prices rise, leading to expansion and acquisitions. Analysts view it as the sector's biggest wave.
data.description: In a recent news commentary by USA News Group on behalf of Magma Silver Corp, it was highlighted that silver miners are capitalizing on the price gains of 2025 for expansion and acquisitions. Analysts are referring to this move as a significant development in the sector. The operations expansion and acquisitions are indicative of a growing trend within the industry. The commentary emphasized the strategic utilization of the increased prices by miners to strengthen their presence in the market. This initiative serves as a pivotal moment for silver mining companies as they leverage the current financial landscape to broaden their scope and enhance their competitiveness.

data.title: Nvidia's stock has surged $2 trillion since April but faces skepticism ahead of Q3 earnings report. Wall Street remains cautious.
data.description: Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) has seen a remarkable surge of $2 trillion in market cap since hitting a low point in April 2025. Currently trading near its peak, NVDA stock has investors questioning if the rapid rally is sustainable. The AI leader is gearing up to disclose third-quarter earnings after the markets close on Wednesday, with high expectations from investors. Analysts at Goldman Sachs, led by James Schneider, Ph.D., are optimistic about Nvidia's future growth potential but emphasize a potential pause in catalysts for further stock advancement. Schneider highlighted the company's strong prospects for 2026 driven by hyperscaler CapEx momentum and increased demand from non-traditional clients. However, he cautioned that without tangible data supporting estimates, the stock may face challenges in outperforming in the short term. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: In Guangyuan, Sichuan Province, ancient Shudao road system showcases history, connecting people.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Guangyuan, a city located in Southwest China's Sichuan Province, visitors can marvel at the ancient road system known as "Shudao" as they hike up the Mingyue Gorge. This system includes the pre-Qin Dynasty plank road and the Jinniu Road, both of which meander through the region. This historical site offers a glimpse into the past with its intricate pathways that have stood the test of time.
Company repurchases 500,000 of its own shares at $10 each. Share buyback total: $5 million.

data.title: SalMar completes share buyback program, purchased 100,000 shares for NOK 65 million through DNB Carnegie.
data.description: SalMar ASA disclosed on 21 August 2025 its initiation of a share repurchase scheme where they aim to acquire a maximum of 100,000 of their own shares, totaling approximately NOK 65 million. The program is set to run from 21 August 2025 until 30 September 2025 and is being executed in collaboration with DNB Carnegie, a division of DNB Bank ASA.

data.title: Inter-Rock Minerals Inc. initiates NCIB to buy back 1,000,000 common shares, representing 4.6% of total shares outstanding.
data.description: Inter-Rock Minerals Inc. (TSX-V: IRO) announced on August 25, 2025 that they have initiated a normal course issuer bid (NCIB) approved by the TSX Venture Exchange to repurchase up to 1,000,000 common shares of the company for cancellation. This represents about 4.6% of the total 21,733,811 common shares currently issued and outstanding, and approximately 9.2% of the 10,882,411 common shares in the Public Float. Independent Trading Group Inc. has been appointed as the broker for the NCIB.

data.title: Elon Musk fears China's dominance in AI due to electricity and hardware advantage, sees them as toughest competitors.
data.description: Elon Musk is acknowledging the fierce competition he faces from Chinese companies in the AI sector, citing their strong presence in electricity generation and hardware manufacturing. Despite his confidence in xAI surpassing Google, Musk recognizes the formidable challenge posed by Chinese firms in this rapidly advancing industry. This highlights the intense race for dominance in AI, where speed, resources, and influence will determine the leaders of this technological age. Follow the latest updates on GOOGL stock. For more details, visit Benzinga.com to read the full article on Musk's views on the evolving landscape of AI and the potential implications for companies like Tesla.

data.title: Melissa & Doug updates their viral vending machine with new Beauty Kiosk Play Set for the holiday season. #1 preschool brand introduces trendy toy.
data.description: The newest version of a popular vending machine from the leading preschool brand offers a unique combination of traditional imaginative play and current trends. This sought-after holiday toy is a hit with young beauty enthusiasts everywhere. Released on August 25, 2025, in Wilton, Connecticut, by Melissa & Doug, known for their environmentally-friendly wooden toys, this innovative product is sure to be a favorite this season.
